---
title: "Career Strategy"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: true
  warning: false
---

## Overview

This page synthesizes our findings from EDA and skill gap analysis into actionable career strategies for each team member.

```{python}
#| label: setup-career
#| code-summary: "Load libraries"

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.io as pio
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

# ── Apply consistent Plotly theme ────────────────────────────────────────
custom_template = go.layout.Template()
custom_template.layout = go.Layout(
    font=dict(family="Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif", size=13, color="#2c3e50"),
    title=dict(font=dict(size=20, color="#2c3e50"), x=0.5, xanchor="center"),
    paper_bgcolor="white",
    plot_bgcolor="#f8f9fa",
    colorway=["#3498db", "#e74c3c", "#2ecc71", "#f39c12", "#9b59b6",
              "#1abc9c", "#e67e22", "#34495e", "#16a085", "#c0392b"],
    xaxis=dict(gridcolor="#dee2e6", linecolor="#adb5bd"),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor="#dee2e6", linecolor="#adb5bd"),
    hoverlabel=dict(font_size=12),
    margin=dict(t=60, b=40, l=50, r=30),
)
pio.templates["job_market"] = custom_template
pio.templates.default = "job_market"
```

## 1. Market-Aligned Career Paths

Based on our analysis, these career paths align with current market demand:

```{python}
#| label: career-paths
#| code-summary: "Career path alignment"

paths = pd.DataFrame({
    "Career Path": [
        "Data Analyst",
        "Data Scientist",
        "Data Engineer",
        "ML Engineer",
        "Cloud/DevOps Engineer"
    ],
    "Core Skills Required": [
        "Python, SQL, Tableau, Excel, Communication",
        "Python, SQL, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, R",
        "Python, SQL, Spark, AWS, Docker, ETL",
        "Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Docker, Cloud",
        "AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Linux, Git"
    ],
    "Avg Salary Range": [
        "$55K – $85K",
        "$85K – $130K",
        "$90K – $140K",
        "$100K – $150K",
        "$95K – $145K"
    ],
    "Job Availability": [
        "Very High",
        "High",
        "High",
        "High",
        "Very High"
    ]
})

paths.style.set_properties(**{
    'text-align': 'left',
    'white-space': 'pre-wrap'
})
```

## 2. 90-Day Action Plan

```{python}
#| label: action-plan-visual
#| code-summary: "90-day learning timeline"

timeline = pd.DataFrame({
    "Phase": ["Month 1"] * 3 + ["Month 2"] * 3 + ["Month 3"] * 3,
    "Task": [
        "Complete Python/SQL refresher",
        "Set up cloud account (AWS Free Tier)",
        "Begin ML fundamentals course",
        "Build a portfolio project",
        "Earn one cloud certification",
        "Practice with real datasets (Kaggle)",
        "Deploy a project to cloud",
        "Start networking & applying",
        "Conduct mock interviews"
    ],
    "Category": [
        "Technical", "Cloud", "ML",
        "Portfolio", "Cloud", "Technical",
        "Cloud", "Career", "Career"
    ]
})

fig = px.timeline(
    pd.DataFrame({
        "Task": timeline["Task"],
        "Start": pd.to_datetime([
            "2024-01-01", "2024-01-08", "2024-01-15",
            "2024-02-01", "2024-02-08", "2024-02-15",
            "2024-03-01", "2024-03-08", "2024-03-15"
        ]),
        "End": pd.to_datetime([
            "2024-01-28", "2024-01-28", "2024-01-28",
            "2024-02-28", "2024-02-28", "2024-02-28",
            "2024-03-28", "2024-03-28", "2024-03-28"
        ]),
        "Phase": timeline["Phase"]
    }),
    x_start="Start", x_end="End", y="Task",
    color="Phase",
    title="90-Day Career Development Timeline"
)
fig.update_layout(height=450, yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"))
fig.show()
```

## 3. Recommended Certifications

Based on the gap analysis, these certifications offer the best return on investment:

```{python}
#| label: certifications
#| code-summary: "Certification recommendations"

certs = pd.DataFrame({
    "Certification": [
        "AWS Cloud Practitioner",
        "AWS Solutions Architect – Associate",
        "Google Data Analytics (Coursera)",
        "Tableau Desktop Specialist",
        "Microsoft Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)",
        "IBM Data Science Professional Certificate"
    ],
    "Relevance": ["Cloud", "Cloud", "Analytics", "Visualization", "Cloud", "Data Science"],
    "Difficulty": ["Beginner", "Intermediate", "Beginner", "Intermediate", "Beginner", "Intermediate"],
    "Approx. Cost": ["$100", "$150", "$49/mo", "$100", "Free", "$49/mo"],
    "Time to Complete": ["2-4 weeks", "4-8 weeks", "6 months", "2-4 weeks", "1-2 weeks", "4-6 months"]
})

fig = px.bar(
    certs, x="Certification", y=[1]*len(certs),
    color="Relevance",
    title="Recommended Certifications by Category",
    hover_data=["Difficulty", "Approx. Cost", "Time to Complete"]
)
fig.update_layout(yaxis_visible=False, showlegend=True, height=350)
fig.update_traces(hovertemplate="<b>%{x}</b><br>Difficulty: %{customdata[0]}<br>Cost: %{customdata[1]}<br>Duration: %{customdata[2]}")
fig.show()

certs
```

## Summary

The IT job market in 2024 heavily favors candidates with a blend of programming fundamentals (Python, SQL), cloud literacy (AWS, Docker), and domain-specific expertise (ML, data visualization). By following the structured improvement plan from the Skill Gap Analysis and pursuing targeted certifications, each team member can significantly improve their competitiveness within 90 days.
